posts.author: Michele_Decadis (Michele Toscani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Simplify Your Board Management with Batch Hero for monday

If managing multiple boards and columns on monday feels like a time sink, Batch Hero for monday is here to make things easier. Designed for anyone who handles numerous boards, Batch Hero brings faster, simpler board and column operations tools.

**Key Features at a Glance: **

10000345_2024_9_29_11_10_42_uxc0boo1920×960 308 KB

1. Powerful features at your fingertips:

  • Column Ops: smart column management – Effortlessly add, duplicate, or remove columns across multiple boards instantly. Save hours with batch column operations.

    10000345_2024_9_29_11_10_53_23y00fi1920×960 247 KB

  • Board Ops: streamlined board operations – Batch operations for boards just got intuitive. Move, copy, archive, delete, or change ownership of multiple boards with just a few clicks.

    10000345_2024_9_29_11_11_2_ws5qtkpl1920×960 275 KB

2. Quick Board Actions:

  • Create or rename boards instantly: Set up or reorganize boards with minimal effort.
  • Filter and sort boards: Quickly find the boards you need when you need them.

3. Improved User Experience:

Batch Hero now includes an updated interface for clearer navigation, a refined dark mode, and dedicated columns to manage permissions easily. The app’s performance is faster and more responsive than ever.

Who Will Benefit?

Batch Hero is ideal for:

  • monday board admins
  • Project managers
  • Product owners
  • Sales and marketing teams

For anyone managing multiple boards regularly, Batch Hero is designed to save time and simplify everyday tasks.

Get Started

To start using Batch Hero, install it and add it to your workspace. Then, select the boards you want to update and apply bulk changes with just a few clicks.

Head over to the monday.com Marketplace to check out Batch Hero today.

Our support team is ready for questions or assistance, and you can book a free demo anytime.
